Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x080D "SNAKEVSBOMB-080D" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Snake vs Bomb (TND - 2022).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Changed the LDA $BA instruction at $080D to LDA #$01 instead to remove highscore loading and saving to disk.
